overall.description: Cinematic third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking through a gas-lit Victorian residential neighborhood at night. The character approaches a mansion, sits on the porch to smoke a cigarette, then stands to observe the surroundings. The scene features wet brick pathways, lush gardens, and warm gas lamp illumination against a dark blue night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential garden path between historic houses

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet brick pathway between Victorian houses, approaching the mansion

entered.detail: two-story wooden house with shuttered windows
large Victorian mansion with wrap-around porch and columns
wet brick walkway reflecting the gas lamp light
lush green hedges lining the path
cast iron street lamp emitting warm orange light

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow brick pathway between historic Victorian houses at night. Gas lamps cast warm reflections on the wet pavement while lush garden vegetation lines the route toward the main mansion visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered porch entrance of Victorian mansion

events.description: turns from garden path onto the house porch, entering the covered area
character approaches and sits down in the white wicker chair on the porch

agents.ego_description: walking up the porch steps and approaching the wicker chair near the front door

entered.detail: tall white wooden columns supporting the porch roof
white wicker armchair on the porch
green double doors with glass panels and sidelights

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the open garden path onto the covered porch of the mansion. Tall white columns frame the approach to the green front door, where a white wicker chair sits ready. The character walks up and sits down in the chair.

events.description: character takes out a cigarette, lights it, and begins smoking while seated
character stands up from the wicker chair

agents.ego_description: sitting in the wicker chair smoking a cigarette and looking around the garden area, appearing contemplative

segments.scene_description: Seated on the porch, the character smokes a cigarette while the camera slowly pans to show the surrounding garden and distant gas lamps. The porch columns frame the view of the lush vegetation and the night sky beyond.

events.description: character moves to the porch edge and looks out toward the garden and street

agents.ego_description: standing on the porch looking out at the garden, distant gas lamps, and surrounding neighborhood

entered.detail: potted ferns hanging from the porch ceiling
wooden railing at the edge of the porch overlooking the garden

segments.scene_description: Standing up from the chair, the character moves to the porch edge to survey the surroundings. The camera captures the hanging ferns and porch railing as the character looks out over the garden toward the distant gas-lit street, maintaining a contemplative atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a walk through a gas-lit residential street to a contemplative moment on a mansion's porch. It begins with the character traversing a narrow brick pathway between historic Victorian houses, where warm gas lamps reflect off the wet pavement and lush gardens lead toward a distant estate. As the character reaches the mansion, the scene shifts from the open garden to the sheltered porch, moving past tall white columns toward a green front door before the character settles into a white wicker chair. While seated, the camera slowly pans away from the character to reveal the surrounding vegetation and the dark night sky framed by the porch architecture. Finally, the character stands and moves to the porch edge, where the view expands past hanging ferns and railings to survey the distant, glowing street lamps.
